psalm-86-1.verse:
Incline Your ear, O Lord, and answer me;
  For I am afflicted and needy.
psalm-86-1.prayer: Lord, incline Your ear and answer me. When I feel poor, needy, or weak, help me come to You with trust and humility.

psalm-86-2.verse:
Preserve my soul, for I am a godly man;
  O You my God, save Your servant who trusts in You.
psalm-86-2.prayer: Father, preserve my soul and keep me faithful to You. I trust in You as my God and my helper.

psalm-86-3.verse:
Be gracious to me, O Lord,
  For to You I cry all day long.
psalm-86-3.prayer: Lord, be gracious to me, for I call upon You throughout the day. Let Your mercy strengthen and sustain me.

psalm-86-4.verse:
Make glad the soul of Your servant,
  For to You, O Lord, I lift up my soul.
psalm-86-4.prayer: Father, bring gladness to my soul as I lift my heart to You. Restore joy where I feel weary or burdened.

psalm-86-5.verse:
For You, Lord, are good, and ready to forgive,
  And abundant in lovingkindness to all who call upon You.
psalm-86-5.prayer: Lord, thank You for being good, forgiving, and abundant in lovingkindness to all who call upon You.

psalm-86-6.verse:
Give ear, O Lord, to my prayer;
  And give heed to the voice of my supplications!
psalm-86-6.prayer: Father, hear my prayer and listen to my cry for mercy. Thank You that I can bring every need before You.

psalm-86-7.verse:
In the day of my trouble I shall call upon You,
  For You will answer me.
psalm-86-7.prayer: Lord, in the day of trouble I call upon You because You answer me with wisdom, mercy, and faithfulness.

psalm-86-8.verse:
There is no one like You among the gods, O Lord,
  Nor are there any works like Yours.
psalm-86-8.prayer: Father, there is no one like You. Help me worship You with reverence and trust Your works above all else.

psalm-86-9.verse:
All nations whom You have made shall come and worship before You, O Lord,
  And they shall glorify Your name.
psalm-86-9.prayer: Lord, may all nations come and worship before You. Let my life also glorify Your holy name.

psalm-86-10.verse:
For You are great and do wondrous deeds;
  You alone are God.
psalm-86-10.prayer: Father, You are great and do wondrous deeds. Remind me that You alone are God.

psalm-86-11.prayer: Lord, teach me Your way so I may walk in Your truth. Unite my heart to fear and honor Your name.

psalm-86-12.verse:
I will give thanks to You, O Lord my God, with all my heart,
  And will glorify Your name forever.
psalm-86-12.prayer: Father, help me give thanks to You with all my heart and glorify Your name forever.

psalm-86-13.verse:
For Your lovingkindness toward me is great,
  And You have delivered my soul from the depths of Sheol.
psalm-86-13.prayer: Lord, thank You for Your great lovingkindness and for delivering my soul from the depths.

psalm-86-14.verse:
O God, arrogant men have risen up against me,
  And a band of violent men have sought my life,
  And they have not set You before them.
psalm-86-14.prayer: Father, when pride, opposition, or harm rises against me, protect me and keep my heart steady in You.

psalm-86-15.verse:
But You, O Lord, are a God merciful and gracious,
  Slow to anger and abundant in lovingkindness and truth.
psalm-86-15.prayer: Lord, thank You for being compassionate, gracious, slow to anger, and abundant in lovingkindness and truth.

psalm-86-16.prayer: Father, turn to me and be gracious. Strengthen me as Your servant and help me walk faithfully before You.

psalm-86-17.verse:
Show me a sign for good,
  That those who hate me may see it and be ashamed,
  Because You, O Lord, have helped me and comforted me.
psalm-86-17.prayer: Lord, show me Your goodness and let my life be a testimony of Your help, comfort, and faithfulness.

psalm-86-closing.verse:
Lord, thank You for Your goodness, mercy, forgiveness, and steadfast love. Teach me Your way, unite my heart to honor You, and help me walk in Your truth every day. When trouble comes, remind me that You are compassionate, gracious, and faithful to answer. Strengthen me, comfort me, and let my life glorify Your name forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
psalm-86-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your goodness, mercy, forgiveness, and steadfast love. Teach me Your way, unite my heart to honor You, and help me walk in Your truth every day. When trouble comes, remind me that You are compassionate, gracious, and faithful to answer. Strengthen me, comfort me, and let my life glorify Your name forever.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
